events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer raw JSON. Need analyze scenario: block/brick laying, head joints unfilled visible voids, rough-complete, commercial, TMS 402/602. Decision should be fail because head joints must be filled (mortar joints). Risk high due structural integrity, fire, etc. Conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80? Value irrelevant 0. Findings: unfilled head joints, visible voids. Actions: remove/repoint, fill mortar joints, verify by inspector, etc. Rationale: TMS 402/602 requires fully bedded and filled mortar joints; voids reduce strength and weather resistance. References TMS 402/602. Need produce exact JSON shape.
